title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrates building an event management system with role-based access control using Softr's AI Co-Builder feature. The video compares Softr against alternatives like Lovable and Replit for no-code application development with workflow automations and permission handling.
